---
title: "Add Minimal Attributes to the NGEN Hydrofabric"
date: "2026-04-30"
params:
  nextgen_geopackage: "..."
  soil_grid: "..."
  vegetation_grid: "..."
  impervious_grid: "..."
  groundwater_basins_table: "..."
  channel_geometry_table: "..." 
  output_nextgen_geopackage: "..."
---


```{r}
library(sf)
library(hfngen)
library(arrow)
```


## Compute Minimal Divide Attributes

```{r}

# Compute minimal divide attributes
# Requires the following input datasetys:
# ISLTYP - Soil Type Grid - https://proxy.lynker-spatial.com/gridded/nwm/CONUS/ 
# IVGTYP - Vegetation Type Grid - https://proxy.lynker-spatial.com/gridded/nwm/CONUS/ 
# IMP - Impervious Surfaces Grid - https://proxy.lynker-spatial.com/gridded/nwm/CONUS/derived/
# GW - Ground Water Basin Table - https://proxy.lynker-spatial.com/tabular/ 

# load the groundwater basins using arrow. This is because the 
# minimal_div_atts fucntion takes a table object
gw_basins <- arrow::open_dataset(params$groundwater_basins_table)

# compute the divide attributes
div_atts <- minimal_div_atts(params$nextgen_geopackage,
                             ISLTYP = params$soil,
                             IVGTYP = params$veg,
                             IMP    = params$imperv,
                             GW     = gw_basins)


```


## Compute Minimal Flowpath Attributes

```{r}

# Read the network layer within the nextgen geopackage into a tibble
net = sf::read_sf(params$nextgen_geopackage, "network")


# Load the channel geometry table into memory 
hydraulic_atts <- arrow::open_dataset(params$channel_geometry_table)

# Compute the minimal channel attributes
atts = c('owp_y_bf', 'owp_tw_bf','bf_area', 'owp_roughness_bathy','slope')
flow_atts <- calculate_flow_atts(net,
                    hydraulic_atts,
                    hf_id = "flowline_id",
                    attribute_cols = atts,
                    weight_col = 'lengthkm')
```


## Save the Computed Attributes to the NGEN Geopackage

```{r}

# Copy the input geopackage to a new file, then add the attributes
file.copy(params$nextgen_geopackage, params$output_nextgen_geopackage)

# Add divide attributes to the ngen geopackage
st_write(div_atts,
         params$output_nextgen_geopackage,
         layer = "divide-attributes",
         append = TRUE)


# Add the flowpath attributes to the ngen geopackage
st_write(flow_atts,
         params$output_nextgen_geopackage,
         layer = "flowpath-attributes",
         append = TRUE)
```
